About

My name is Marco, I’m 24 years old and I’m Italian. I’ve always been interested in computers and technology. That lead me to take a degree in Electronic Engineering.

Other then that my passion are:

  • videogames
  • books, tv shows, music
  • Linux

Contact me with a message on reddit or Discord (Fonsy#6372).
